data.title: Community-Centric
data.description: Focuses on building strong community engagement and connections.
data.technical_spec: Features like Stories, Reels, and Direct Messages to foster interaction.

data.title: Creative Expression
data.description: Prioritizes creativity and self-expression through diverse content creation tools.
data.technical_spec: A suite of editing tools and effects within the app for content creation.

data.title: Visual First
data.technical_spec: High-resolution image support and a predominance of visual content in feeds.

data.title: Innovation Driver
data.description: Continuously introduces innovative features and formats.
data.technical_spec: Regular updates and iterations of app features to leverage the latest technology.

data.title: User Privacy Commitment
data.description: Strong emphasis on user data protection and privacy.
data.technical_spec: Comprehensive privacy settings allowing users significant control over data sharing.
